item.title: House Build Day 12
item.description: A mid-project update from a house build showing early construction milestones and on-site progress. The video captures framing and structural development. What stage do you think defines a build the most?

media:content.media:title: House Build Day 12
media:content.media:description: A mid-project update from a house build showing early construction milestones and on-site progress. The video captures framing and structural development. What stage do you think defines a build the most?

item.title: Farmhouse Progress
item.description: A general update on the ongoing farmhouse construction project, showing progress across different stages of the build. The video highlights teamwork and on-site development. Which part of building a house do you enjoy seeing most?

media:content.media:title: Farmhouse Progress
media:content.media:description: A general update on the ongoing farmhouse construction project, showing progress across different stages of the build. The video highlights teamwork and on-site development. Which part of building a house do you enjoy seeing most?

item.title: How House Walls Are Built
item.description: An explanation of the process behind building house walls, from framing to structural completion. The video breaks down key construction methods used on-site. What part of wall construction surprised you most?

media:content.media:title: How House Walls Are Built
media:content.media:description: An explanation of the process behind building house walls, from framing to structural completion. The video breaks down key construction methods used on-site. What part of wall construction surprised you most?

item.title: Farmhouse Build: Plumbing on Days 7 and 8
item.description: A look at plumbing work during the early stages of a farmhouse construction project. The video follows installation steps and behind-the-scenes building progress. What part of home construction feels the most complex?

media:content.media:title: Farmhouse Build: Plumbing on Days 7 and 8
media:content.media:description: A look at plumbing work during the early stages of a farmhouse construction project. The video follows installation steps and behind-the-scenes building progress. What part of home construction feels the most complex?

item.title: House Build Day 25 Progress Update
item.description: A progress update from an ongoing house build project, showing key construction steps and on-site work. The video highlights the development of the structure as it moves closer to completion. What stage of a build do you find most interesting to watch?

media:content.media:title: House Build Day 25 Progress Update
media:content.media:description: A progress update from an ongoing house build project, showing key construction steps and on-site work. The video highlights the development of the structure as it moves closer to completion. What stage of a build do you find most interesting to watch?

item.title: New Leveling Method Test
item.description: A new technique for leveling structures is tested on-site to improve accuracy and speed during construction. What advantages does this method bring?

media:content.media:title: New Leveling Method Test
media:content.media:description: A new technique for leveling structures is tested on-site to improve accuracy and speed during construction. What advantages does this method bring?

item.title: Roof Sealing Progress Update
item.description: An update on roof sealing work shows improvements in weatherproofing and finishing details. How important is proper sealing for long-term durability?

media:content.media:title: Roof Sealing Progress Update
media:content.media:description: An update on roof sealing work shows improvements in weatherproofing and finishing details. How important is proper sealing for long-term durability?

item.title: Building a Better Space for the Job
item.description: A construction space is upgraded and optimized to improve workflow, safety, and efficiency on site. What changes make the biggest difference in daily work?

media:content.media:title: Building a Better Space for the Job
media:content.media:description: A construction space is upgraded and optimized to improve workflow, safety, and efficiency on site. What changes make the biggest difference in daily work?

item.title: Stair Building in Progress
item.description: A step-by-step look at framing and constructing stairs with precision and proper alignment on a real job site. What makes stair building one of the trickiest parts of construction?

media:content.media:title: Stair Building in Progress
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at framing and constructing stairs with precision and proper alignment on a real job site. What makes stair building one of the trickiest parts of construction?

item.title: Plunge Cutting Tips With a Circular Saw
item.description: Practical guidance on safely making plunge cuts with a circular saw, focusing on control, accuracy, and avoiding common mistakes. What techniques help keep every cut clean and precise?

media:content.media:title: Plunge Cutting Tips With a Circular Saw
media:content.media:description: Practical guidance on safely making plunge cuts with a circular saw, focusing on control, accuracy, and avoiding common mistakes. What techniques help keep every cut clean and precise?

item.title: One Dream, One Build
item.description: A construction journey driven by a single vision, showing how planning, teamwork, and craftsmanship come together on a real build. What does it take to turn a dream project into reality?

media:content.media:title: One Dream, One Build
media:content.media:description: A construction journey driven by a single vision, showing how planning, teamwork, and craftsmanship come together on a real build. What does it take to turn a dream project into reality?

item.title: Budget Barn Build Progress
item.description: A budget-friendly barn project continues with ramp construction and exterior siding installation. How do you balance cost and durability in builds?

media:content.media:title: Budget Barn Build Progress
media:content.media:description: A budget-friendly barn project continues with ramp construction and exterior siding installation. How do you balance cost and durability in builds?
